title: September 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 8''' is the 251st day of the year (252nd in leap years). There are 114 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Archie Goodwin]] is born.
*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Willard Huyck]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 64|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 64]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Scoundrel's Wages]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Nicolas Cantu]] is born.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 24|''Empire'' 24]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Droids Over Iego]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[The Power of the Dark Side]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[William Shakespeare's Tragedy of the Sith's Revenge: Star Wars Part the Third]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Darth Vader and Son / Vader's Little Princess Deluxe Box Set]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[This is Luke]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[The Sims 4 Star Wars: Journey to Batuu]]'' released.
*[[2021]] – [[War of the Bounty Hunters 4|''War of the Bounty Hunters'' 4]] published.
*2021 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 14|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 14]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 9|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 9]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[Master & Apprentice: A Special Look at Ahsoka]]'' aired on Disney+.
*2023 – "[[Tree Troubles / Big Brother's Bounty]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: Poe Dameron Omnibus]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
